KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.title: Promise
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.description: There are {Amount} card(s) in the Promise pile.
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.voidDescription: I am now the emptiest person in the world.
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.mode.void: [gold]The Emptiest Person in the World[/gold]: The draw pile is now treated as the Promise pile.
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.mode.infinite: [gold]Restaging of the Fated Stage[/gold]: The Promise pile is now filled with endless [gold]Encore[/gold].
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.mode.burn: [gold]Burn, Burn, Burn Bright[/gold]: Cards drawn from the Promise pile are now upgraded and Exhaust when played.
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.mode.pastAndFut: [gold]Past and Future[/gold]: When drawing from the Promise pile, gain {Amount} Temporary Strength.
KAREN_PASSION_POWER.title: Passion
KAREN_STAR_FRIEND_POWER.title: Star Friendship
KAREN_STAR_FRIEND_POWER.description: The stars have woven our friendship. Gain extra rewards when killing enemies.
KAREN_LETTER_POWER.title: Letter
KAREN_LETTER_POWER.description: Whenever you put a card into the Promise Pile, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KAREN_STARLIGHT_POWER.title: Starlight
KAREN_STARLIGHT_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Shine card, play it {Repeat:diff()} more time(s), then deplete its Shine.
KAREN_STARLIGHT03_POWER.title: Starlight
KAREN_AQUARIUM_POWER.title: Aquarium
KAREN_AQUARIUM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card, then put 1 card from your hand into the [gold]Promise Pile[/gold].
KAREN_PAST_AND_FUTURE_POWER.title: Past and Future
KAREN_PAST_AND_FUTURE_POWER.description: When drawing from the Promise Pile, gain {Amount} Temporary Strength.
KAREN_PAST_AND_FUTURE_POWER.smartDescrip: When drawing from the Promise Pile, gain {Amount} Temporary Strength.
KAREN_TICKET_POWER.title: Ticket
KAREN_TICKET_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 Tower of Promise to your hand.
KAREN_TICKET_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of each turn, add {Amount} Tower of Promise to your hand.
KAREN_WE_KNOW_POWER.title: Stage of Promise
KAREN_WE_KNOW_POWER.description: At the start of combat, add Stage to the Promise Pile.
KAREN_WE_KNOW_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of combat, add {Amount} Stage to the Promise Pile.
